name: GitLab repositories should not have open secret detection alerts
description: Repositories with open GitLab secret detection vulnerabilities
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where GitLab reports open secret detection vulnerabilities.

### Assessment context

Open secret detection findings can indicate exposed credentials or tokens in source code or repository history. Cyscale assesses the repository as failing while GitLab reports one or more detected or confirmed secret detection vulnerabilities.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Treat exposed secrets as compromised. Revoke or rotate the credential, remove it from code and history where practical, and resolve the GitLab vulnerability after confirming the secret can no longer be used.
